name: @coord/shared
description: Canonical home for cross-repo shared utilities/components. The convergence target for the Component-library-convergence quality dimension (COORD-136): logic currently duplicated across frontend/, the coord-ui app, and backend/ converges ONTO this zero-dependency package, and the extraction-tuned arch-checks duplication gate (lower minLines + cross-repo corpus, ratchet mode) keeps new divergence from growing.
